rules.failure: CTR fixes do not generate clicks after recrawl (7-14 days)
rules.correction: Stop title-only fixes. Improve page intent match, above-fold CTA, short answer, and FAQ instead.

rules.failure: Internal links do not move parent calculators up in rankings (14-21 days)
rules.correction: Strengthen source pages (add more relevant context around links). Add links from higher-authority indexed pages. Reduce links to thin variants.

rules.failure: Tool/scenario variants rank but parent pages do not
rules.correction: FREEZE variant optimization. Strengthen parents with content, internal links, and better titles. Add parent CTA to variant meta descriptions (DONE in Phase 20.7).
Add stronger unique examples and original content. Add contextual internal links from indexed pages (blogs, calculators).

rules.failure: Blogs get impressions but no clicks
rules.correction: Improve title/snippet intent match. Stop writing similar blogs in low-demand topics. Focus on high-search-demand finance topics only.

rules.failure: Outreach gets 0 replies after 32 emails (20 initial + 12 follow-ups)
rules.correction: Pause outreach. Rewrite pitch with shorter format and more specific value prop. Target smaller sites and personal finance bloggers only.

rules.failure: GSC data is stale 2+ days in a row
rules.correction: BLOCK daily run. Fix pipeline. Do not resume until fresh pull succeeds.
rules.status: FIXED — Dynamic pipeline deployed in Phase 20.7
